---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani"
subtitle: "Data Scientist | Neuroscience"
image: profile_pic_akg.jpg
image-alt: Photo of Abdelkarim el Ghani
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

Welcome to my portfolio!
